authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(166) — Willow Creek (Alpine Co.)
sources.quotedText: (166) Willow Creek (Alpine Co.) upstream from the confluence with the West Fork Carson River to the main tributary of Willow Creek. All year. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (updated June 1, 2026)
Carson River — California Trout, Sierra Headwaters Region
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Stream (Mouth) layer record for gaz_id 269136, "Willow Creek", Stream, Alpine County, CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":269136,"gaz_name":"Willow Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Alpine"}; geometry (Web Mercator -13349176.538, 4689916.9716) converts to lon -119.9177, lat 38.7780, correcting the file's previously recorded coordinate (-119.9200, 38.7000), which was off by roughly 8.7km. Cross-checked against HomeTownLocator's independent listing (lat 38.7779618, lon -119.9176802, Freel Peak USGS quad), which matches to within ~10m.

parameters.note: Open all year, catch-and-release only (0 trout bag limit).

regulations.humanSummary: Open all year, catch-and-release only, on Willow Creek from the confluence with the West Fork Carson River upstream to the main tributary of Willow Creek
regulations.verbatimText: Willow Creek (Alpine Co.) upstream from the confluence with the West Fork Carson River to the main tributary of Willow Creek. All year.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: 0 trout — catch-and-release only, no trout may be kept.

regulations.humanSummary: Zero trout bag limit — catch-and-release only

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
